titles.en: Chapter on Taking Pebbles for Jamarat From Inside or Outside the Sacred Area
Chapter on Taking Pebbles for Jamarat From Inside or Outside the Sacred Area

segments: : «يُجْزِيكَ أَنْ تَأْخُذَ حَصَى اَلْجِمَارِ مِنَ اَلْحَرَمِ كُلِّهِ إِلاَّ مِنَ اَلْمَسْجِدِ اَلْحَرَامِ وَ مَسْجِدِ اَلْخَيْفِ ».
arabic.text: : «يُجْزِيكَ أَنْ تَأْخُذَ حَصَى اَلْجِمَارِ مِنَ اَلْحَرَمِ كُلِّهِ إِلاَّ مِنَ اَلْمَسْجِدِ اَلْحَرَامِ وَ مَسْجِدِ اَلْخَيْفِ ».

segments:
Hadith.2997 - Hanan ibn Sadeer narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is sufficient for you to take the pebbles for the Jamarat from anywhere within the boundaries of the Haram, except from the Sacred Mosque (Masjid al-Haram) and Masjid al-Khayf."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2997 - Hanan ibn Sadeer narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is sufficient for you to take the pebbles for the Jamarat from anywhere within the boundaries of the Haram, except from the Sacred Mosque (Masjid al-Haram) and Masjid al-Khayf."

narratorChain.raw: 2997 - رَوَى حَنَانُ بْنُ سَدِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
